results.title: EDITORIAL: Accelerate actions against Medicaid fraud
results.description: If this was an effort to get Hawaii’s attention, it worked. The federal government last week alerted state authorities that Hawaii’s Medicaid Fraud Control Unit has been decertified, meaning that it would lose the $3 million in annual federal dollars that pays for its operation. The post EDITORIAL: Accelerate actions against Medicaid fraud appeared first on The Garden Island .

results.title: Oil executives warn White House that gas prices will get worse
results.description: Grim predictions add to the problems of a president already facing a sharp rise in inflation.

results.title: St. Joseph Planning Commission in the midst of leadership change
results.description: ST. JOSEPH — A policy adopted this winter in St. Joseph is starting to have an impact on the boards and commissions which help the city function.
